meaning: n.底土,下层土,天然地基v.掘起...的底土
examples: Rock fragments from the subsoil can end up concentrated on the surface.
Nitrate and water-soluble organic nitrogen were migrated with deionised water migrating and increased subsoil fertility.

In Latin America, mining industry contracts were awarded to China to help exploit valuable subsoil resources.
